title: LEFT/RIGHT OUTER JOIN Algorithm Verification
algorithm: Nested loop outer join with null-marker

invariants.name: SideInvariant
invariants.description: All left_result rows have side=1, all right_result rows have side=2

invariants.name: LeftDone
invariants.description: Left buffer empty implies left_result has exactly LeftSize entries

invariants.name: RightDone
invariants.description: Right buffer empty implies right_result has exactly RightSize entries

notes: Uses Pick helper to avoid CHOOSE-in-Append TLC limitation
Termination guaranteed by WF_vars fairness on Next
